headline: Synopsys Advances Power and Performance for AI and Multi-Die Designs on Latest Samsung Foundry Processes at SAFE Forum 2026
summary: Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced at Samsung Advanced Foundry Ecosystem (SAFE) Forum 2026 its latest collaborations with Samsung Foundry on advanced nodes, including an expanded portfolio of production‑ready, AI-powered EDA tools, certified interface IP, and silicon-based test capabilities, enabling customers to bring differentiated AI and multi-die designs to market faster and with measurably improved quality.

headline: Can Synopsys Stock Hit $700 This Year?
summary: Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) runs the software that designs nearly every advanced chip on the planet. The electronic design automation leader sits at the center of the AI buildout, yet its stock has barely moved over the past year. It trades at $524.74, up 11.71% YTD but still 17% below its 52-week high. CEO Sassine Ghazi told ... Can Synopsys Stock Hit $700 This Year?

headline: Why Synopsys (SNPS) Is Up 5.4% After Raising 2026 Outlook And Adding Elliott-Backed Director
summary: Synopsys Inc. recently reported fiscal second-quarter 2026 results that exceeded its own guidance, raised full-year revenue and GAAP EPS forecasts, and disclosed a cooperation agreement with Elliott Investment Management that will add Jesse Cohn to its board as an independent director, expanding the board to 11 members. The sharp contrast between higher revenue and much lower GAAP earnings, alongside an activist investor gaining board influence, highlights how Synopsys is balancing growth...
